title: carlina subacaulis var. simplex
intro: Carlina subacaulis var. simplex is a lesser-known variety of the Carline thistle plant, which is a perennial herb belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects, which help to soothe digestive issues and reduce pain. The health benefits of Carlina subacaulis var. simplex include its ability to alleviate menstrual cramps, reduce fever, and support the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for internal use, as well as being applied topically to the skin to aid in wound healing.
